acceptance_criteria.evidence: buildRouteTacticalAssessment() explicitly computes start, transit, and destination risk from the route digest.
Tactical state derives route states such as HOT START, CAMP LIKELY, DEST HOT, PURSUIT, and WINDOW OPEN.
formatIntelMessage() now renders a tactical summary and window/confidence layer before operational advice.
buildIntelPrompt() now includes a dedicated tactical assessment block for the LLM route-intel path.
Advisor unit tests cover quiet output, gate-camp/hot-start assessment, and destination-hot separation.
npm run check passed on the final codebase.

commands: npm run test -- tests/unit/eve-board-advisor.test.ts tests/unit/eve-board-monitor.test.ts tests/unit/eve-board-analytics.test.ts
